transcription.text: This New York City restaurant will make you feel like you're the main character of a rom-com. This place seriously has it all. Mood lighting, cozy corners, and incredible food. By the way, if you're looking for more hidden gems with this aesthetic, come to New York City to buy my New York City itinerary. And you'll find this restaurant in Tribeca. It's called Alisa's. Follow for more.
